name: libtext-csv-xs-perl
title: libtext-csv-xs-perl
summary: Perl C/XS module to process Comma-Separated Value files
description:
Perl C/XS module to process Comma-Separated Value files
Text::CSV_XS provides facilities for the composition and decomposition of
comma-separated values. This module can combine fields into a CSV string and,
correspondingly, parse a CSV string back into fields.
.
Text::CSV (see libtext-csv-perl) is a wrapper module which will automatically
select the most appropriate implementation for your configuration.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtext-csv-xs-perl because Perl C/XS module to process Comma-Separated Value files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtext-csv-xs-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtext-csv-xs-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtext-csv-xs-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
